notes: Use this file as the machine-readable source for repeatable Pinterest API posting tests.
Run create commands with --dry-run first. Do not create new public Pins without owner-approved campaign copy and assets.

pins.title: Funny White Elephant Gifts People Will Actually Steal
pins.description: Need a gift exchange idea that gets a reaction? Browse funny, weird, and useful white elephant picks from goose.gifts before the next party.
pins.altText: Funny white elephant gift guide from goose.gifts.

pins.title: Weird Kitchen Gadgets That Are Actually Giftable
